nasb.text: the anointing oil also, and the fragrant incense for the holy place, they are to make them according to all that I have commanded you.”

esv.text: and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense for the Holy Place. According to all that I have commanded you, they shall do.”

cnv.text: 膏油和聖所使用的芬芳的香，他們都要照著我吩咐你的一切去作。”

ccb.text: 以及膏油和圣所使用的芬芳的香。他们要照我对你的吩咐去做。”
